name: cms-dme
description: Medicare FFS durable-medical-equipment (CPAP) packet. The 'Medicare Part B' letterhead routes the bundle to the cms-medicare-ffs payer bucket and the DME context anchors engage the §4.5.2 CMS FFS overlay (face-to-face, written order, proof of delivery, sleep study) instead of letting it vacuously pass.

documents.name: cms-pa-form.txt
documents.text:
Medicare Part B Prior Authorization Request
Noridian Medicare DME MAC Jurisdiction
Patient: Robert E Lee
DOB: 1948-01-19
Member ID: 1EG4TE5MK73
Date of service: 2026-05-10
Place of service: 12
Durable medical equipment: CPAP device E0601
HCPCS E0601
Quantity: 1
Dx: G47.33 obstructive sleep apnea
Ordering provider NPI: 1234567893
Servicing facility NPI: 1306849393
TIN: 123456789
Standard written order: CPAP E0601, signed.
Proof of delivery: recipient signature on file, delivery date 2026-05-12.
Signature: Sleep Med MD, 2026-05-08

documents.name: cms-note.txt
documents.text:
Clinical note
Face-to-face encounter documented 2026-04-20.
Chief complaint: loud snoring, witnessed apneas.
Assessment and plan: obstructive sleep apnea, initiate CPAP.
Medical necessity: AHI 32 on diagnostic sleep study.
Sleep study date: 2026-03-01. Results: AHI 32 events/hour.
Note date: 2026-04-20
Signed: Sleep Med MD, 2026-04-20
